content:
# Transtensional Pull Apart

**Summary**: A basin formed by a combination of strike-slip and extension.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] characterized the Sufyan Sub-basin as a transtensional pull-apart system.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] explains the unique E-W trend of the Sufyan Sub-basin.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] analysis of gravity and seismic data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Sufyan is described as a transtensional pull-apart Sub-basin affected by both CASZ (transtensional) and Muglad Basin (extension). ([[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017, p. 38]])
